emails.subject: WFW - pacific virgo invoices
emails.body: WFW pacific virgo invoices Hi Angeline I received your fax this date regarding the WFW pacific virgo invoice. What I am looking for is a copy of the back-up to the statement you sent. In other words, I need a breakdown of the time billed by each attorney working on this matter. All I have is the one page listing $137,455.18 what does this consist of? Please forward this to me so I can arrange for payment of this invoice. Thanks. Linda Guinn Enron North America 1400 Smith Street Houston, Texas 77002 (713) 853-6104 (713) 646-3393 (fax)

emails.subject: Re: WFW - pacific virgo invoices
emails.body: Re: WFW pacific virgo invoices Hi Linda I have just faxed to you the statement that reflects the various items charged by Watson Farley, which was attached to Watson's invoice. My apologies for any inconvenience caused. Angie From: Linda R Guinn on 12/12/2000 12:14 AM
